user.title: Connect to Crestron Home
user.description: Use the processor HTTPS base URL (e.g. https://192.168.1.10) and the Web API token from the Crestron Home installer app. Disable TLS verification only if the processor uses a self-signed certificate.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect or login. Check URL, token, network, and SSL settings.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the Web API token.
